---
title: "rig rm"
---

<!-- Generated by website/gen-cli-reference.sh. Do not edit by hand. -->

## `rig rm`

```text
Description:
  Remove an R installation. It keeps the users' package libraries.
  It automatically calls `rig system forget` before removing the files.

  In user mode no `sudo` is needed. In admin mode you usually need to run
  this command with `sudo`: `sudo rig rm ...`, otherwise rig will ask for
  your password.

Usage: rig rm [OPTIONS] [version]...

Arguments:
  [version]...
          versions to remove

Options:
      --all
          remove all versions (TODO)

      --user
          Run in user mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)

      --admin
          Run in admin mode (overrides RIG_MODE and config)

  -h, --help
          Print help (see a summary with '-h')
```
